summary: Completed full backend and frontend testing of Nexo One ERP - Multi-tenant SaaS with Go backend proxied through FastAPI. All 18 backend tests pass. Frontend login flow, dashboard, and mechanic module UI working correctly.

minor.issue: Response uses PascalCase JSON (Go convention) instead of snake_case - may cause frontend integration issues if not handled
Requires customer_id field but returns 500 Internal Server Error instead of 400 Bad Request for missing required field

integration_issues.issue: Page uses mock data (mockOS array) instead of fetching from backend API /api/v1/mechanic/os

issues: 404 console error for favicon or some static resource - minor issue

action_items: Consider adding json tags with snake_case to Go structs for API responses (optional - PascalCase is valid Go convention)
Fix error handling in mechanic Create endpoint - should return 400 for validation errors, not 500
Connect frontend mechanic page to backend API instead of using mock data
critical_code_review_comments: Tax Engine: Well-implemented with proper IBS/CBS 2026 transition factors, cesta basica logic, and imposto seletivo
Auth: JWT-based auth working correctly with proper token refresh flow
In-memory repositories are fine for preview but production needs PostgreSQL + RLS as documented
seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo tenant and in-memory repositories
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend Go binary proxied through FastAPI on port 8001. All APIs working. Frontend uses Next.js standalone. Mechanic page currently shows mock data - needs API integration. Auth requires tenant_slug (snake_case) in login request.

tested_features.auth_login: PASS - Returns access_token with Bearer type
tested_features.tax_aliquota_padrao: PASS - NCM 84715010 returns correct IBS/CBS amounts
tested_features.mechanic_list_os: PASS - Returns list with total count
tested_features.frontend_dashboard: PASS - KPI cards, charts, OS table, AI suggestions panel
tested_features.frontend_mechanic: PASS - Stats, filters, OS table, New OS modal
